title: Timeline Estimates: When Will Quantum Computers Break Cryptography?
description: Analyze predictions for cryptographically relevant quantum computers. Understand the factors driving timelines, why uncertainty exists, and how to plan despite unknowns.
learningObjectives: Understand what 'cryptographically relevant quantum computer' means
Analyze various timeline predictions and their assumptions
Identify key milestones in quantum computing development
Explain factors that could accelerate or delay timelines
Develop planning strategies despite timeline uncertainty
Apply the precautionary principle to cryptographic decisions
